text: Red plasma ball - shoots a small ball at the enemy.
Technobarrier - Creates a barrier that entities cannot pass through, but some types of damage can pass through it.
Turret - creates a turret that shoots plasma balls at enemies.
$(o)Condition:$() Redstone or redstone devices within 16 blocks.
Tech Shock: 10% chance to stun target for 5 sec on attack.
